{{Missing Info}}

= Black Friday Lucky Week =
[[File:Black Friday Lucky Week Poster.png|200px|left|alt=Black Friday Lucky Week]]
Nov. 29 - Dec. 05 2024

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=104
{{Clear}}

= Relic Rewards =
* {{ImageWithLink|?|orange}}
* {{ImageWithLink|?|green}}
* {{ImageWithLink|?|green}}

= Robot Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|?|orange|Robots}}

= Shell Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|?|purple}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|?|purple}}

[[Category:Events]]
